items.briefing:
Telstra is experiencing a mobile outage affecting services across Australia today — if you're having trouble with calls or data, this appears to be a network issue rather than a security incident, though outages can sometimes be exploited by scammers impersonating telcos. Separately, a job scam targeting marketing professionals is circulating, using fake big-brand job offers to steal Google account credentials — be cautious of unsolicited job opportunities, even if they appear legitimate.

**Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected job offer via email or social media, verify it directly through the company's official website before clicking any links or entering login details.

featured.title: Telstra mobile outage disrupts services across Australia
featured.quote: Major Telstra outage directly disrupted millions of Australians' essential mobile communications nationwide.
